extraction.one_line_summary: DAINESE Alberto won bunch sprint at Shepparton after five-rider break absorbed inside 5km to go, taking first overall.
tactical_patterns: Mitchelton-Scott deployed Sam Welsford as peloton pacemaker from 30km out, collapsing 3-minute break to ensure sprinter setup.
COYLE Jesse burned solo bridge effort then couldn't contest second intermediate sprint, first to abandon break chase.

rider_signals.DAINESE Alberto: positive: former SEG Racing teammate outsprinted GROVES using Cav-esque low position, showing successful World Tour transition
rider_signals.GROVES Caden: positive: marked as superb prospect with strong second place, also transitioning well to World Tour level
rider_signals.COYLE Jesse: negative: misjudged effort to bridge solo instead of waiting for peloton absorption, exhausted before sprint
